title: La Leyenda de los Chaneques
posterAlt: La Leyenda de los Chaneques (2023) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Five years after giving up his powers and separating from his friends, Leo San Juan has started a new life trying to focus on his family and their bakery, staying away from danger and adventures. However, Leo knows that his plans are rarely fulfilled and this time is no exception: while traveling with Nando to Veracruz, things start to get weird, and from the depths of the Tuxtlas jungle, an ancient curse has returned and only Leo can face it.
synopsis: La Leyenda de los Chaneques is a 2023 animation, comedy and family film in Spanish. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.4 on TMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a A certification (MX rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
